data.body:
## Description

In `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-transition.sh`:
1. Add DSO_COMPACT_SCRIPT env var override (default: `$SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-compact.sh`), following the same pattern as DSO_UNBLOCK_SCRIPT (line 270).
2. Within the `if [ "$target_status" = "closed" ]` block (lines 268-288), AFTER the unblock section, add the compact-on-close call:
   ```bash
   compact_script="${DSO_COMPACT_SCRIPT:-$SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-compact.sh}"
   bash "$compact_script" "$ticket_id" --threshold=0 --skip-sync 2>/dev/null || true
   ```
   The `|| true` ensures compaction failure never fails the close operation.
   The `2>/dev/null` suppresses compact's informational output.

## File Impact
- Modify: `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-transition.sh`

## TDD Requirement (GREEN)
Task 3 tests go GREEN: test_close_triggers_compaction passes (SNAPSHOT created on close), test_close_succeeds_if_compact_fails passes (DSO_COMPACT_SCRIPT override injects failure, close still exits 0).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] All transition tests pass including new compact-on-close tests
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-transition.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAILED: 0'
- [ ] Compact is called within the close block only
  Verify: grep -A5 'target_status.*closed' plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-transition.sh | grep -q 'compact'
